buffs.title: Spirit Break
buffs.desc:
· Increases Agent Anomaly Buildup Rate by <color=#2BAD00>30%</color> and <color=#FFFFFF>Disorder</color> DMG by <color=#2BAD00>40%</color>.

· When there are 1/2 Agents with the Attack specialty in the squad, the whole squad's ATK <color=#2BAD00>increases by 10%/25%</color>.
· Agents' Basic Attack DMG <color=#2BAD00>increases by 40%</color> and ignores 20% of the enemy's <color=#2EB6FF>Electric RES</color>.

buffs.title: Heartcrusher
buffs.desc:
· Agent CRIT DMG <color=#2BAD00>increases by 30%</color>.
· ATK of Agents with Attack specialty <color=#2BAD00>increases by 10%</color>. Their Basic Attack DMG <color=#2BAD00>increases by 30%</color> and ignore <color=#2BAD00>15%</color> of enemy DEF.

buffs.title: Metamorph
buffs.desc:
· When an Agent inflicts an Attribute Anomaly on an enemy, the enemy recovers from Stun <color=#2BAD00>15% slower</color>, and the whole squad's ATK <color=#2BAD00>increases by 15%</color> for 20s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
· When an enemy is Stunned, the whole squad recovers <color=#2BAD00>20 Energy</color>, and Abloom DMG <color=#2BAD00>increases by 30%</color> for 30s. Repeated triggers reset the duration. The Energy Generation effect can trigger once every 30s.

buffs.title: Combined Attack
buffs.desc:
· When there are 1/2 Agents with Attack specialty in the squad, the whole squad's CRIT DMG <color=#2BAD00>increases by 20%/60%</color>.
· After an EX Special Attack or Ultimate, the Agent's <color=#2EB6FF>Electric DMG</color> <color=#2BAD00>increases</color> by 20%. For Agents with Attack specialty, their DMG <color=#2BAD00>further increases by 30%</color> for 20s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.

buffs.title: Scorching Frost

buffs.title: Oblivion
buffs.desc:

· After launching a <color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</color>, the whole squad's ATK increases by <color=#2BAD00>10%</color> and CRIT DMG increases by <color=#2BAD00>15%</color> for 20s, stacking up to 3 times. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
